title: Tenure options and payout terms for Savings
content: [SYNTHETIC POLICY FOR DEMO PURPOSES ONLY] NexBank Savings products offer flexible tenure options ranging from a minimum of 7 days up to a maximum duration of 10 years. Payout frequencies can be customized at the inception of the contract to be disbursed monthly, quarterly, or accumulated at maturity. Premature withdrawals are permitted but subject to a nominal penalty charge of 0.5% on the contracted interest rate. Automatic renewal facility is enabled by default unless written instruction is received 48 hours prior to maturity.
